mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_cart (uid, pid, price, num, created_user, created_time, modified_user, modified_time) VALUES (#{uid}, #{pid}, #{price}, #{num}, #{createdUser}, now(), #{modifiedUser}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT cid, uid, pid, price, num FROM t_cart WHERE uid=#{uid}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_cart SET num=#{num}, modified_time=now() WHERE cid=#{cid}
mapper.select: SELECT cid, uid, pid, num FROM t_cart WHERE cid=#{cid}
